title: Wire real model-selection (close B-2). REAL SITE over CDP.
objective: Map + wire the real ChatGPT model picker (a Radix dropdown) so model_settings={'model': '<label>'} actually selects a model live over CDP; keep FAIL-CLOSED (ModelUnavailableError if a requested model is absent). Prove via UI STATE, not self-report. Update VERIFICATION.md + docs/USAGE.md without overclaim.
constraints: CDP attach ONLY (127.0.0.1:9222); preflight PASSED at dispatch (Chrome/149). Never launch a browser.
NO stealth; login NEVER automated; ANY challenge/logout/profile-lock -> STOP HUMAN-ACTION-NEEDED + poll READ-ONLY, never click through.
Own tabs only; close()=detach never quit. Work in the tool's own tab; do NOT change global account settings.

LEAK GUARD (this task leaked in M-009): capture ONLY model-option labels; NEVER capture/log/commit account/profile/email/name/avatar/plan. Reuse hardened redact()+isAccount(); emit raw text only when it matches MODEL_RE. Scrub immediately; never let an identifier reach a commit.
Human-paced, NO message cap, no spam; per-message audit log; redact /c/<id>.
Default test tier stays mock-only (real_site marker + ASK_CHATGPT_REAL=1 double-gate).
uv sync --all-groups; uv run from repo root; never bare python / shared agent venv.
RED-first for behavior changes; keep all mock tests green (212).
Workers DO NOT git commit/push; manager leak-reviews then commits. NEVER git push.
Telemetry v2: ESTIMATE/ACTUAL/end-timestamp/REWORK-CAUSE in every worker report.
